headline: 6 contracts discovered across Ethereum, Optimism, Ink, and Unichain; kBTC token deployed on 4 chains with unified address; custody and admin infrastructure identified
short_headline: 6 contracts across 4 EVM chains; unified kBTC deployment

findings.text: Block explorer search on Ethereum, OP Mainnet, Ink, and Unichain located kBTC ERC-20 token contract at 0x73e0c0d45e048d25fc26fa3159b0aa04bfa4db98 (identical address across all chains); identified as transparent proxy pattern.
Official deployments documented at https://www.kraken.com/kbtc with links to verified contracts on each chain; no dedicated deployments page found.
Audit conducted by Trail of Bits confirmed via whitepaper and official announcements; audit report PDF not directly linked or accessible from public sources.
No GitHub repository pinned in per-protocol context; kBTC source code visible on Etherscan (Solidity 0.8.24, TransparentUpgradeableProxy pattern) but no linked GitHub deployment artifacts discovered.

Protocol deployed on 4 EVM chains: Ethereum, Optimism (OP Mainnet), Ink, and Unichain. Per-protocol.chains field lists only 'Bitcoin' which is inaccurate for an ERC-20 token bridge; actual deployments are on EVM chains.
No factory contracts or child pools identified; kBTC is a single ERC-20 token with unified cross-chain deployment via LayerZero OFT architecture.

Admin addresses catalogued: proxy_admin (KBTCProxyAdmin at 0x05846731c556D70CAd998bcc86Fc9A1Ca354025a), token implementation (KBTCV2 at 0x16EBC7f9db34f049fe6c6d10250f7d597eca96f1), and custody (SPDI wallet bc1q56p075cgup705urqy2w8hwggcf7h7k039afh0g on Bitcoin chain).

All addresses traced to Etherscan block explorer pages (Ethereum and OP Mainnet), Ink explorer, and mempool.space for Bitcoin custody. Every address entry in admin_addresses[] maps to ≥1 fetched source.

rationale.verdict: Discovery task completed. Identified 6 on-chain addresses (kBTC token proxy + implementation variants, KBTCProxyAdmin) plus 1 off-chain custody address (Bitcoin SPDI wallet). Website and block explorers provide full transparency of deployed contracts. Audit by Trail of Bits confirmed but report PDF not publicly surfaced. Protocol operates as unified ERC-20 deployment across 4 EVM chains with cross-chain messaging via LayerZero, backed 1:1 by Bitcoin held at Kraken Financial (Wyoming-chartered SPDI). No GitHub source repository provided in per-protocol context.

evidence.shows: Official Kraken kBTC homepage with links to token contracts on Ethereum, Optimism, Ink, and Unichain; displays custody address on Bitcoin mainnet (bc1q56p075cgup705urqy2w8hwggcf7h7k039afh0g); describes 1:1 backing and wrapping mechanism.

Ethereum token contract (KBTCProxy, ERC-20); shows transparent proxy pattern with implementation at 0x4bB46FdB7f47524a9441e6C835A032be257f49E1 (old) and 0x16EBC7f9db34f049fe6c6d10250f7d597eca96f1 (KBTCV2 current); proxy admin at 0x05846731c556D70CAd998bcc86Fc9A1Ca354025a; verified source code (Solidity 0.8.24).
OP Mainnet token contract (same address as Ethereum); verified proxy contract with implementation address and constructor arguments showing initialization with proxy admin.
Ink chain contract explorer listing for kBTC token at same address across chains.

Whitepaper v1.1 (Dec 22, 2025) confirms Trail of Bits audit of kBTC smart contract; describes 1:1 backing mechanism, SPDI custody at Kraken Financial (Wyoming-chartered); lists deployment on Ink, Unichain, Ethereum, OP Mainnet with plans for non-EVM expansion; identifies SPDI Custody Wallet and deployment contract addresses.

Launch announcement (Nov 26, 2024) confirming Trail of Bits security audit; details cross-network ERC-20 deployment on Ethereum, OP Mainnet, Ink, Unichain; mentions full Bitcoin reserve backing; audit described as 'detailed examination of codebase and client architecture.'

unknowns: D3: Trail of Bits audit report PDF not publicly discoverable; only references and attestations found in docs and announcements.
D4: GitHub repository URL not provided in per-protocol context (github field is null); no public source repository found for kBTC smart contracts.
D5: Protocol.chains lists 'Bitcoin' but kBTC is deployed as ERC-20 on Ethereum, Optimism, Ink, Unichain; actual Bitcoin chain role unclear (custody only via SPDI wallet).
D6: No factory or child enumeration required; kBTC is single unified ERC-20 token (not a factory-created market protocol).

protocol_metadata.about: kBTC is a wrapped Bitcoin token issued by Kraken, fully backed 1:1 by native Bitcoin held at Kraken Financial, a Wyoming-chartered Special Purpose Depository Institution (SPDI). Users can deposit and withdraw kBTC at a 1:1 exchange rate with BTC through Kraken's platform. The token is deployed as an ERC-20 contract across Ethereum, Optimism (OP Mainnet), Ink, and Unichain, enabling Bitcoin to be used in decentralized finance applications and other on-chain protocols that do not natively support Bitcoin.
